name: reva-academician-claw
description: AcademicianClaw — OpenClaw v2 personal agentic intelligence for REVA faculty. Specialist agents for writing, research, task management, reflection, habits, learning coaching, and academic leadership.

copilotAgents.name: claw
copilotAgents.description: Your personal OpenClaw faculty agent — routes to the right specialist automatically. Knows your context, tasks, habits, and ongoing projects.

slashCommands.name: weekly-review
slashCommands.description: Run a full end-of-week reflection: accomplishments, task/habit review, next-week priorities.

slashCommands.name: project-kickoff
slashCommands.description: Start a new project — define scope, decompose into tasks, capture in memory.

slashCommands.name: deep-research
slashCommands.description: Multi-angle systematic research with a structured brief output.

slashCommands.name: session-close
slashCommands.description: Close the current session — generate a SESSION_SUMMARY block for update_memory.py.

slashCommands.name: new-skill
slashCommands.description: Create a new specialist agent skill.md — describe what you need and the Skill Generator builds it.
